header:
# Changelog

All notable changes to the axhub Claude Code plugin will be documented here.
Format follows [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/), versioning follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/).

scripts.postbump: bun run codegen:version && git add bin/install.sh bin/install.ps1 Cargo.toml && bun run release:check
scripts.posttag: echo '\n다음 단계: git push origin main --tags  → release.yml 가 자동 fire 돼요.\nCHANGELOG 본문은 tag 생성 전에 사람이 작성해야 해요 (해요체 narrative).'
